title: average_price
text:
## average_price
Definition: mean(price)
Type: aggregation
Default aggregation: mean

title: occupancy_proxy
text:
## occupancy_proxy
Definition: (30 - availability_30) / 30
Type: derived_metric
Default aggregation: mean

title: revenue_proxy
text:
## revenue_proxy
Definition: price * (30 - availability_30)
Type: derived_metric
Default aggregation: sum

title: superhost_premium
text:
## superhost_premium
Definition: mean(price | is_superhost=True) - mean(price | is_superhost=False)
Type: comparison

title: review_activity
text:
## review_activity
Definition: number_of_reviews or growth in number_of_reviews over time
Type: aggregation
Default aggregation: sum

title: room_type
text:
## room_type
Type of listing:
- Entire home/apt
- Private room
- Shared room

title: price
text:
## price
Nightly listing price in DKK.

title: availability_30
text:
## availability_30
Number of days the listing is available in the next 30 days.

title: number_of_reviews
text:
## number_of_reviews
Total number of reviews the listing has received.

title: review_score
text:
## review_score
Overall review rating (0–5 scale). Missing if no reviews.

title: last_review
text:
## last_review
Date of most recent review.

title: minimum_nights
text:
## minimum_nights
Minimum stay requirement in nights.

title: is_superhost
text:
## is_superhost
Boolean indicating whether the host is a superhost.
